text: Built RESTful API endpoints in Node.js and Express.js handling 500+ daily requests with JWT-based authentication and role-based access control
Designed and implemented a React dashboard with real-time data visualization using Chart.js and WebSocket for live metric updates
Architected microservices in Python/FastAPI deployed on AWS EC2 behind an Application Load Balancer, reducing API latency by 35%
Migrated monolithic Django application to containerized microservices using Docker and Kubernetes, enabling independent scaling of 6 service modules
Led design and delivery of a distributed event-driven system using Apache Kafka consuming 2M+ events/day with exactly-once delivery guarantees
Developed full-stack e-commerce platform using React, Node.js, and MongoDB with Stripe payment integration and real-time order tracking
Built CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions automating build, test, and deployment to AWS S3 and CloudFront, cutting release time from 2 hours to 8 minutes
Implemented caching layer with Redis reducing database load by 60% on high-traffic product listing endpoints
Designed PostgreSQL schema with optimized indexes and query plans supporting 10K concurrent users without N+1 fetch issues
Implemented responsive UI components in React with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Storybook documentation ensuring WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards
Optimized React application bundle size by 45% through code splitting, lazy loading, and tree shaking, improving Lighthouse performance score from 62 to 91
Wrote Python scripts automating data extraction from 15+ external APIs, normalizing JSON responses into structured PostgreSQL records
Built Django REST Framework API with OAuth2 authentication, serializer-level validation, and Celery background task queue for report generation
Designed and maintained ETL pipelines using Apache Airflow orchestrating 20+ daily data ingestion jobs from MySQL and external REST APIs into BigQuery
Trained and deployed a gradient boosting classifier achieving 93% F1-score on churn prediction, integrated via FastAPI endpoint consumed by the CRM dashboard
Built interactive Power BI dashboards tracking 12 KPIs across 3 business units, reducing weekly reporting effort by 8 hours
Provisioned and managed AWS infrastructure using Terraform IaC across 3 environments (dev/staging/prod), enabling one-command environment replication
Configured Prometheus and Grafana monitoring stack with custom alerting rules reducing mean-time-to-detect production incidents from 18 minutes to 3 minutes
Defined product roadmap and OKRs for a B2B SaaS product, prioritizing features using RICE scoring and shipping 3 major releases per quarter

Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, and Python. Comfortable with REST API design, SQL/NoSQL databases, and Agile development workflows.
Backend-focused software engineer with 3 years building scalable APIs and distributed systems in Python and Go. Strong background in PostgreSQL, Redis caching, and AWS cloud infrastructure.
Developed 3 REST API endpoints in Express.js for user authentication module, wrote Jest unit tests achieving 85% code coverage on the auth service
Debugged and resolved 12 production bugs in the React frontend tracked via Jira, collaborating with senior engineers in bi-weekly sprint reviews
Implemented pagination and search filters on the admin dashboard using React Query and PostgreSQL full-text search, reducing page load time by 40%
Built real-time chat application using Socket.io, React, Node.js, and MongoDB with JWT authentication supporting 200 concurrent users
Full-stack task management app with Kanban board, drag-and-drop via react-beautiful-dnd, and MongoDB aggregation pipelines for analytics dashboard
Designed serverless architecture on AWS Lambda and API Gateway handling variable traffic spikes up to 10x baseline load without pre-provisioning
Implemented OAuth2/OIDC authentication flow with refresh token rotation and PKCE, eliminating token theft vulnerability in the mobile client
